items.name: FontConfig
items.comment: Font appearance shared by lyric lines and their annotation sub-lines.

fields.name: family
fields.comment: Font family name; empty uses the platform default.

fields.name: size
comment: Font size; a bare number or `px` is absolute.
`%` is relative to the parent line's font size (e.g. translation / background lines).

items.name: StyleConfig
items.comment: Visual style for a single render state.

fields.name: color
comment: Accepts `#RGB` / `#RGBA` / `#RRGGBB` / `#RRGGBBAA`, `rgb(r, g, b)` or `rgba(r, g, b, a)` (a in 0..1).
